title: draba zionensis
intro: Draba zionensis, also known as Zion rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Zion rockcress has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Draba zionensis typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in ointments and salves.
